implemented_factors.formula: -delta_4q(0.5 * total_liab / total_assets + 0.5 * total_cur_liab / total_assets) + (n_cashflow_act - netprofit) / total_assets

best_unadjusted_abs_ic.interpretation: directional audit only; not a lead because FDR, ICIR, positive-rate, quantile, and neutral gates failed

blocked_actions: Do not promote either Round244 new substructure factor.
Do not run portfolio grids from these prescreen results.
Do not invert aq_abnormal_accrual_change_reversal and claim discovery without preregistering the directional audit and charging it as an additional hypothesis test.
Do not mix old raw/repaired cash-accrual factors into the Round244 new-substructure IC conclusion.
allowed_next_actions: Run a preregistered Round245 directional audit for the abnormal accrual change sign only if it is counted as a new hypothesis family test.
Implement another Round243 seed substructure, preferably post-statement announcement drift or profitability revision surprise, before any portfolio conversion.
Keep A-share tradeability, PIT timing, industry/style neutralization, cost/capacity, regime, and multiple-testing gates mandatory.
safety: Research-to-review only. No broker connection, no account reads, no order placement, no live trading.
